name_en: Goyard 💕 MORVAN Briefcase Lightweight, slim, practical, and elegantly designed, it is an ideal choice for both daily and professional use. It features a zip closure, two round leather handles for comfortable carrying, and an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody wear.
name_cn:
Goyard 💕 MORVAN Briefcase Lightweight, slim, practical, and elegantly designed, it is an ideal choice for both daily and professional use. It features a zip closure, two round leather handles for comfortable carrying, and an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody wear.
Size: 39×6.5×29cm
Color: Grey
Style: 120247
